title: 3 Traits God Builds in a Man Through Ordinary Work
caption:
Nobody builds a man overnight.

He gets built in the unglamorous Tuesday — the rep no one claps for, the project no one promotes, the morning no one sees.

God's not waiting for your mountaintop. He's in the ordinary. And in it, He's building faithfulness, steadiness, and integrity — three things that actually last.

Which one is He building in you this week?

Save this and come back to it Friday.

#faith #discipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #thework #christianity #scripture #discipleship
